title: epidendrum pachypodum
intro: Epidendrum pachypodum, also known as the "fat-pod orchid", is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Epidendrum pachypodum are typically made from the roots and leaves, which are used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
